Invoice generated
              Sent at the start of each billing cycle once the invoice PDF is finalised.

Payment failed
              Immediate alert on declined card, ACH return, or wire reversal.

Subscription renewed
              Receipt notification after successful auto-renewal of the active plan.

Trial expiring
              Reminders at T-7, T-3, and T-1 days before trial conversion.

Usage threshold reached
              Fires when monthly secret-read or seat consumption crosses 80% of plan quota.

Overage incurred
              Notifies billing contacts whenever metered usage exceeds the plan ceiling.

Login from new device
              Triggered when an authenticated session originates from an unrecognised device fingerprint or IP geo.

Password changed
              Confirms a successful password rotation, including admin-initiated resets.

MFA disabled
              High-priority alert when any second-factor method is removed from the account.

API key rotated
              Notifies the owner whenever a personal or service API key is regenerated or revoked.

Suspicious activity
              Risk engine flags such as impossible travel, brute force, or anomalous secret-read patterns.
